name: o-matic-wordpress-factory
description: O-Matic WordPress Factory plugin with bundled brand, build, writing, and visual skills plus separate WordPress and Elementor MCP connectors.

scripts.check: node --check server/index.mjs && node --check server/elementor.mjs && node --check server/lib/mcp-connector.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-mcp.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-bundled-skills.mjs && node server/index.mjs --self-test && node server/elementor.mjs --self-test && node scripts/smoke-mcp.mjs
